description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by three wide, dark metal hoops. The wood has a natural, medium-brown color with visible grain texture, giving it a rustic and weathered appearance. The metal bands are slightly tarnished and studded with round rivets, reinforcing the structure and adding to its durability. The top and bottom surfaces are flat, with the top surface made of the same wood as the sides, and no lid is present. There are no visible handles or markings on the exterior. This type of barrel is commonly used for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in urban, industrial, or outdoor settings.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with three dark metal hoops and a weathered wood texture, lacking handles or markings. The structure is reinforced and suitable for storage or transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cylindrical shape, three metal hoops, and the wood grain texture.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the staves and the riveted metal bands.
description_view_2: Another side view with similar features, emphasizing the even spacing of the metal hoops.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the continuous wood and metal construction.
